title: Little Gubbins 20 Cotton Terry Baby Wipes | Pack of 20cm x 20cm Reusable, Soft White Towelling Cloths | Ideal for Mucky Bums, Hands and Faces | 100% natural & Plastic Free
features: PERFECT FOR SENSITIVE SKIN: made from 100% cotton terry our pack of 20 reusable cloths (20 x 20cm) are super soft & thick making them perfect for cleaning mucky bums, hands and faces

100% NATURAL: Containing zero dyes and chemicals these plastic free, eco friendly towelling squares make the perfect wipe for your newborn or toddler. With a pack of 20 you’ll have enough to keep you going - saving you money and helping our planet

ECO FRIENDLY ALTERNATIVE TO WET WIPES: Cotton has natural aeration and absorbency properties which enable it to remove the body’s moisture easily – the perfect washable, reusable replacement for disposable wet wipes
DURABLE & EASY TO USE: our cotton terry flannels release dirty particles easily without the need for harsh soap or chemicals and are quick drying. Simply wash, tumble and reuse with ease

SOFT & STRONG: excellent for dirty bottoms, including poo, these truly multipurpose cotton flannels can be used for everything from little hands and faces to drying and bathing. They even make a great alternative to bibs and nappy liners!
description: Product Description At Little Gubbins our range of reusable baby wipes are all AZO free and contain no harsh chemicals, something that is super important for us and your little ones. They can all be used on their own or with a little water for a completely natural way to clean any little monkey in any situation. We understand that little ones can be both messy and expensive and are committed to providing only the very best quality products that are reusable, long lasting and save you money. We also promise that our super soft wipes will leave your baby happy and your baby’s skin clean and soft. No more battles when it comes to clean up time – yay! 20 x Cotton Terry Wipes With Laundry Bag Main Benefits PERFECT FOR SENSITIVE SKIN: made from 100% cotton terry our pack of 20 reusable cloths (20 x 20cm) are super soft & thick making them perfect for cleaning mucky bums, hands and faces 100% NATURAL: Containing zero dyes and chemicals these plastic free towelling squares make the perfect wipe for your newborn or toddler. With a pack of 20 you’ll have enough to keep you going - saving you money and helping our planet ALTERNATIVE TO WET WIPES: Cotton has natural aeration and absorbency properties which enable it to remove the body’s moisture easily – the perfect washable, reusable replacement for disposable wet wipes DURABLE & EASY TO USE: our cotton terry flannels release dirty particles easily without the need for harsh soap or chemicals and are quick drying. Simply wash, tumble and reuse with ease SOFT & STRONG: excellent for dirty bottoms, including poo, these truly multipurpose cotton flannels can be used for everything from little hands and faces to drying and bathing. They even make a great alternative to toilet paper! We are really proud to say that with Little Gubbins reusable cloths you can say bye bye to disposable wet wipes for good. With every product we focus on the highest quality and would never bring you anything that we wouldn’t be confident to use on our own children at home every day. You can also rest easy knowing that you are doing something good for the world we live in. We all do our bit to reduce household waste and reusable baby wipes are a natural way to continue that effort and reduce sewer blockages and landfill waste that cost the UK dearly each year. With a pack of 20 you will have plenty of wipes to last you days if not weeks before even needing to do any washing! Little Gubbins 20 Cotton Terry Baby Wipes | Pack of 20cm x 20cm Reusable, Sof...
